scripts.stop: powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "$p = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 3000 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -First 1 -ExpandProperty OwningProcess; if ($p) { Stop-Process -Id $p -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue }"
scripts.restart: powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "$p = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 3000 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -First 1 -ExpandProperty OwningProcess; if ($p) { Stop-Process -Id $p -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Start-Sleep -Milliseconds 500 }; node index.js"
